title: After Major Delay, 2027 Romance Anime Shares New Look Ahead of Season 2 Premiere
content: One of the biggest modern romance anime hits is finally coming back for a second season after a major delay, and has dropped a new look at what to expect from its new season. It’s been a great time to be a romance anime fan as not only have multiple kinds of genres made their anime debuts in the last few years, but…
author: ComicBook

title: Chitose Is in the Ramune Bottle Anime's 2nd Part Premieres in 2026
content: Following a delay from December, the 11th episode aired first on AT-X on Monday at 11:30 p.m., and then episodes 12 and 13 aired at once on Tuesday at 6:00 p.m. All three episodes aired at once on Tuesday starting at 6:30 p.m.
author: ANN

title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Shatters Another Major Record
content: Following the release of Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle in theaters last year, anime fans have been waiting for the latest adventure of Tanjiro and the Demon Slayer Corps to arrive on streaming.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 Confirms Release Date With New Look Revealed
content: Netflix is getting ready for the return of another live-action adaptation following One Piece: Into the Grand Line earlier this March, and has finally set a release date for Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2.
author: ComicBook

title: Chitose Is in the Ramune Bottle Second Cour Premieres in 2026
content: The second cour of Chitose Is in the Ramune Bottle anime is confirmed to premiere in 2026. The first cour concluded on Tuesday with the Asuka Nishino Arc . Main Staff: • Original Work: Hiromu • Original Character Design: raemz • Director: Yuji Tokuno • Series Structure: Naruhisa Arakawa • Script: Hiromu, Narhisa…
author: Anime Corner

title: One Piece Hands Yet Another Upgrade to a Straw Hat (And It’s Still Not Usopp)
content: One Piece ’s manga continues to explore the Elbaph arc, deepening its lore, and in its latest chapter, it gives another Straw Hat an upgrade and importance that isn’t Usopp. The Sniper of the Straw Hats was expected to be one of the most prominent characters in this arc, given how Usopp has always revered the giants…
author: ComicBook

title: The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for The Throne Anime Reveals Cast, Staff, July TV Debut
content: The official website for the anime of Tanba and Yuunagi 's The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for The Throne ( Saikyō Degarashi Ōji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munō o Enjiru SS-Rank Ōji wa Kōi Keishō-sen o Kage kara Shihai Suru ) light novel series opened on Tuesday and announced its television format and July premiere.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasunosora Gets TV Anime in January 2027
content: Love Live! Hasunosora Girls’ High School Idol Club is getting a TV anime set to debut in January 2027. Three new characters have also been introduced: • Maika • Aoi • Mion The previously announced movie of the group is set to premiere on May 8, 2026.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Summer 2026 Premiere
